asset_job_to_launch_for_materialization: Asset job to launch for materialization
asset_keys_targeted_by_the_run: Asset keys targeted by the run
comma_or_newline_separated_asset_keys_e_: Comma- or newline-separated asset keys, e.g. raw/events, summary
comma_separated_partition_keys_for_the_r: Comma-separated partition keys for the reported event
comma_separated_run_statuses_to_filter_b: Comma-separated run statuses to filter by
connect_to_a_dagster_instance_to_launch_: Connect to a Dagster instance to launch job runs, monitor run status, list available jobs across repositories, terminate or delete runs, reexecute failed runs, fetch run logs, and manage schedules and sensors. API token only required for Dagster+.
cursor_from_a_previous_get_run_logs_resp: Cursor from a previous get_run_logs response (for pagination)
cursor_from_a_previous_list_assets_respo: Cursor from a previous list_assets response (for pagination)
dagster_api_token_leave_blank_for_oss_se: Dagster+ API token (leave blank for OSS / self-hosted)
dagster_cloud_api_token_optional_for_sel: Dagster Cloud API token (optional for self-hosted instances)
describe_the_tags_to_attach_to_this_run: Describe the tags to attach to this run...
describe_which_run_statuses_to_include: Describe which run statuses to include...
e_g_asset_job_or_a_named_asset: e.g., __ASSET_JOB or a named asset job
filter_by_asset_key_prefix_e_g_raw: Filter by asset key prefix, e.g. raw (optional)
filter_schedules_by_status_running_or_st: Filter schedules by status (RUNNING or STOPPED)
filter_sensors_by_status_running_or_stop: Filter sensors by status (RUNNING or STOPPED)
id_from_list_schedules_or_list_sensors_o: ID from list_schedules or list_sensors output
instigator_state_id_of_the_schedule_or_s: Instigator state ID of the schedule or sensor
job_name_the_run_belongs_to: Job name the run belongs to
jobs_that_can_materialize_the_asset: Jobs that can materialize the asset
launch_a_dagster_job_run_with_the_right: Launch a Dagster job run with the right config and report the run id and starting status.
list_dagster_schedules_and_sensors_and_s: List Dagster schedules and sensors and start or stop them to control automated pipeline execution.
list_of_runs_runid_jobname_status_tags_s: List of runs (runId, jobName, status, tags, startTime, endTime)
list_of_schedules_name_cronschedule_jobn: List of schedules (name, cronSchedule, jobName, status, id, description, executionTimezone)
list_of_sensors_name_sensortype_status_i: List of sensors (name, sensorType, status, id, description)
list_recent_dagster_runs_surface_failure: List recent Dagster runs, surface failures, and pull logs to diagnose why a run failed.
log_events_type_message_timestamp_level_: Log events (type, message, timestamp, level, stepKey, eventType)
only_return_runs_created_at_after_this_u: Only return runs created at/after this Unix time
only_return_runs_created_at_before_this_: Only return runs created at/before this Unix time
orchestrate_data_pipelines_and_manage_jo: Orchestrate data pipelines and manage job runs with Dagster
pagination_cursor_for_the_next_page_logs: Pagination cursor for the next page (logs, runs, or assets)
re_execute_a_failed_dagster_run_from_the: Re-execute a failed Dagster run from the point of failure and confirm the new run started.
root_run_id_of_the_re_execution_group: Root run ID of the re-execution group
run_id_cursor_for_list_runs_pagination: Run ID cursor for list_runs pagination
run_id_from_a_previous_response_cursor_f: Run ID from a previous response cursor (for pagination)
run_tags_as_array_of_objects: Run tags as array of {key, value} objects
tags_as_json_array_of_objects: Tags as JSON array of {key, value} objects
whether_more_items_are_available_beyond_: Whether more items are available beyond this page
whether_the_run_can_be_terminated: Whether the run can be terminated
